message:
fix(store): fix LTRIM and LRANGE index normalization for out-of-range indices

normalize_index() can return negative values when indices are far out of
range (e.g., LRANGE key -10 -10 on a 3-element list). These negative
values were then cast to usize causing integer wrapping.

Fix: clamp normalized indices to [0, len-1] before the comparison and
the usize cast. Add explicit e < 0 check for empty-result shortcut.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
